title: Theory of Computation Quiz
description: Practice questions on DFA, NFA, Regular Languages, Context-Free Grammars, Pumping Lemma, and Automata Theory.
heading: TOC Practice Quiz

questions.question: Which of the following statements about DFA and NDFA is true?
options: Every NDFA can be converted to an equivalent DFA
NDFA has less expressive power than DFA
DFA allows multiple transitions for same symbol

questions.question: Which of the following is a correct use of the Pumping Lemma for CFL?
options: To prove a language is context-free
To show a language is not context-free
To convert CFG to Chomsky Normal Form

options: A string has more than one parse tree
